## Evidence

- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] Known-good controls do not gain unexplained material differences.
- [ ] Known-bad behavior is reproduced or covered.
- [ ] Engine names and exact versions are explicit.
- [ ] Unavailable proof layers remain labeled.

## Fixture safety

- [ ] No private, customer, personal, credential, or proprietary data is included.
- [ ] New fixture bytes have redistribution permission and manifest provenance.
